name: 25" Metal Christmas Tree Collar Gold - Wondershop™
description:
Frame your holiday tree with the stunning shine of this 25-Inch Metal Christmas Tree Collar from Wondershop™. Crafted in a gleaming gold finish with a ribbed design, it effortlessly blends glam sophistication with seasonal warmth. Made from iron, this tree collar features a round silhouette that flares slightly at the base, helping to cover the tree stand and make your Christmas tree the true centerpiece of the celebrations.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
